TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Satili o Tadamaanay tamdaw ato cipo'otay o tadamaanay tamdaw ilaloma' no sofitay a tamdaw itini i kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo. Mahaop ko honti a kasasiromaroma a malatapangay no sifo, cisakowanay to polong a 'icel-sakowan 'edeng no kawasan'icel ko awaay. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Fise Sotolo Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: sati…ĺi o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u ¶ipo~u °o~utaj o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj tam…¨~…ģaw i…ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u so~ufitaj a tam…¨~…ģaw itini i kasasa °…ôr-no~u °o~urip a fa ¶o~u no~u in…¨~…ģo~u. mańßao~up ko~u ńßo~unti a kasasiro~umaro~uma a ma…ĺatapaŇčaj no~u sifo~u, ¶isako~uwanaj to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a °i ¶…ô…ĺ-sako~uwan °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč no~u kawasan °i ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u awaaj. pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan kasasa °…ôr no~u °o~urip po~u…ĺo~um…ôn fis…ô so~uto~u…ĺo~u tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: Satili o Tadamaanay tamdaw ato cipo'otay o tadamaanay tamdaw ilaloma' no sofitay a tamdaw itini i kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo. Mahaop ko honti a kasasiromaroma a malatapangay no sifo, cisakowanay to polong a 'icel-sakowan 'edeng no kawasan'icel ko awaay. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Fise Sotolo Tatiri'an a tilid
